# Agreement Rebate Partner Company Group

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:3d865127c9d9249d11a7967f7a99c4cb9c94385beea0143cd082a3ec8fe3ddec
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extends the functionality of agreement module to take into
account if agreements affect to all company group members.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

To use this module you need to:

1. Create an agreement related with a company group partner.
2. Create several invoices related with company group members.
3. Create rebate settlements from *Agreements > Settlements > Create Settlements*
   wizard

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/contract/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
